##NAMES=Despujolsite
##RRUFFID=R100208
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_Mn^4+^(SO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_·3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=N'Chwaning III mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Lime green transparent crystal fragment. Sample was used in Barkley et al (2011)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100208
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_3.44_(Mn^+4^_0.86_Fe^+3^_0.06_)(S_0.96_O_4_)_2_(OH)_6_·3H_2_O 
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.5264 b: 8.5264 c: 10.79 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 679.33 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
